extraction.one_line_summary: NIBALI attacked with 5km remaining on Bormio descent, beat LANDA on final corner using tighter line after catching him descending.
tactical_patterns: NIBALI attacked alone from chase group with 5km left, caught LANDA purely on descent skill not climbing strength.
DUMOULIN suffered stomach issue forcing roadside stop but peloton waited showing tactical ceasefire still honored despite QUINTANA's earlier benefit.
LANDA isolated from teammates went solo over Stelvio summit despite 1:43 deficit showing desperation from time gap pressure.
NIBALI avoided wet tire zones on descent corners intentionally, showing equipment management matters as much as cornering aggression.

rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: Attacked from group with summit deficit but superior descending turned certain loss into stage win
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Went all-in solo over Stelvio but couldn't sustain gap when caught, suggesting desperation not strength
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: Stomach issues forced public roadside stop losing 2:18 but retained pink, revealing physical vulnerability under mountain stress
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: Waited for DUMOULIN reciprocating earlier favor but couldn't match NIBALI's descent acceleration when it mattered
rider_signals.POELS Wout: positive: Stayed with NIBALI and QUINTANA on climbs finishing 31 seconds down, showing Sky depth beyond DUMOULIN protection
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: Consistent sixth place quietly banking time while GC contenders marked each other
